$comment: Layer C for RETAIL vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The value chain is NESTED rounding - round2(0.0825 * round0(0.9 * amount)) - which the engine now keeps as an exact recursive form instead of degrading to fuzz. The TIER split (TOTAL > 500) puts a branch boundary directly over the nested form, solved by the exact staircase search on the input grid; the discount's whole-dollar half-boundary is congruence-solved.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 RETAIL (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-retail)
